Worst part about the information age is that I am constantly being fed information that ruins my day. 

Bananas nuke the nutritional value of the smoothie when blended. 

Why live?
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
I don't add bananas to my smoothies.

Why?

Not because bananas are bad (I love bananas). They contain polyphenol oxidase, an enzyme that can break down polyphenols. And studies suggest that when you add banana to a blueberry smoothie, you may absorb fewer of the beneficial https://t.co/7uT7iPRw3j

I wouldn't be as bullish and vocal as I am about the Robinhood Chain ecosystem if I didn't believe there is an incredibly high probability it currently has a fraction of the capital that will be on it in the near future, which makes it well positioned for rapid growth even if the broader market is still struggling a bit.

e.g. still bullish about a lot of different projects / chains in the space

just think there's an asymmetric opportunity and upside to being so early to something bound to attract massive amounts of capital in the near future

and not only that - possibly massive amounts of *new* retail capital as well
